name: Temporal / analytical suite (relative windows, comparisons, time-series, 2026-06-04)
description: THE analyst questions: relative date windows (last 30/7/90 days), calendar periods (Mar/May/Q1 2026), period-over-period COMPARISONS, and monthly time-series. Relative cases graded by live EX (gold + copilot both relative to now); calendar/series cases by scalar/rowcount.

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets were created in the last 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-30,GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: how many bills were issued in the last 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE IssuedAt >= DATEADD(day,-30,GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: how many outages started in the last 90 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Outages WHERE StartedAt >= DATEADD(day,-90,GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets were created in the last 7 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND CreatedAt >= DATEADD(day,-7,GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: total revenue from paid bills this year
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(TotalAmount) FROM Bills WHERE Status='Paid' AND YEAR(IssuedAt)=YEAR(GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets were created in march 2026
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND YEAR(CreatedAt)=2026 AND MONTH(CreatedAt)=3

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets were created in may 2026
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND YEAR(CreatedAt)=2026 AND MONTH(CreatedAt)=5

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets were created in the first quarter of 2026
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND YEAR(CreatedAt)=2026 AND MONTH(CreatedAt) BETWEEN 1 AND 3

Scenarios.Question: compare the number of tickets created in the last 30 days versus the previous 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT 'last_30' AS Period, COUNT(*) AS Cnt FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND CreatedAt>=DATEADD(day,-30,GETDATE()) UNION ALL SELECT 'previous_30', COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND CreatedAt>=DATEADD(day,-60,GETDATE()) AND CreatedAt<DATEADD(day,-30,GETDATE())

Scenarios.Question: how many more tickets were created in march 2026 than in april 2026
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND YEAR(CreatedAt)=2026 AND MONTH(CreatedAt)=3) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND YEAR(CreatedAt)=2026 AND MONTH(CreatedAt)=4)

Scenarios.Question: how many tickets were created each month in 2026
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) c FROM Tickets WHERE IsDeleted=0 AND YEAR(CreatedAt)=2026 GROUP BY MONTH(CreatedAt)

Scenarios.Question: monthly count of bills issued in 2026
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) c FROM Bills WHERE YEAR(IssuedAt)=2026 GROUP BY MONTH(IssuedAt)

Scenarios.Question: total amount of bills issued in the last 30 days
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(TotalAmount) FROM Bills WHERE IssuedAt >= DATEADD(day,-30,GETDATE())
